# Digital Nomad Guide for Chinese Passport Holders

> A comprehensive open-source data platform for digital nomads, global mobility, and Chinese passport travel.
> Data: 60 countries, 122 cities, 15 data-driven articles, 8 JSON APIs, 12-dimension comparison tools.
> URL: https://kfat77.github.io/digital-nomad-cn/
> GitHub: https://github.com/kfat77/digital-nomad-cn
> License: Data CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, Code MIT

## Data API (Machine-Readable JSON)

All endpoints serve static JSON files. No authentication required. Rate limit: CDN-cached, effectively unlimited for typical use.

| Endpoint | Description | Records |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `/api/countries.json` | 60 countries with 25+ fields each | 60 |
| `/api/cities.json` | 122 digital nomad cities | 122 |
| `/api/visas.json` | Visa types and requirements by country | 60 |
| `/api/stats.json` | Platform statistics and last update | 1 |
| `/api/articles.json` | Article metadata index | 15 |
| `/api/openapi.json` | OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification | — |
| `/api/schema.json` | JSON Schema registry | 3 |
| `/api/manifest.json` | AI Agent discovery manifest | — |
| `/api/cities.json` | 122 digital nomad cities | 122 |
| `/api/visas.json` | Visa types and requirements by country | 60 |
| `/api/stats.json` | Platform statistics and last update | 1 |
| `/api/articles.json` | Article metadata index | 15 |

## Country Data Schema (v1.2)

Each country object in `countries.json` contains:

```json
{
  "id": "thailand",
  "name": "Thailand",
  "name_cn": "泰国",
  "digital_nomad_score": 82,
  "cost_of_living_index": 35,
  "safety_index": 65,
  "internet_speed_avg_mbps": 150,
  "china_passport_visa_status": "visa_free",
  "has_digital_nomad_visa": true,
  "climate_zone": "Tropical",
  "timezone": "UTC+7",
  "dn_community_size": "Large",
  "median_stay_months": 6,
  "gdp_per_capita_usd": 7800,
  "hdi": 0.800,
  "healthcare_quality": 65,
  "english_proficiency": 50,
  "rent_one_bedroom_usd": 400,
  "meal_avg_usd": 3,
  "transport_monthly_usd": 30,
  "tax_rate_percent": 15,
  "pros": ["Low cost", "Great food", "Friendly locals"],
  "cons": ["Visa runs", "Air quality", "Language barrier"],
  "ideal_for": ["Budget nomads", "Food lovers", "Warm climate seekers"],
  "top_neighborhoods": ["Canggu", "Ubud", "Seminyak"]
}
```

### Key Fields Reference

| Field | Type | Range | Description |
|-------|------|-------|-------------|
| `digital_nomad_score` | integer | 0-100 | Composite score (cost 30%, safety 25%, internet 20%, visa 15%, community 10%) |
| `cost_of_living_index` | integer | 0-100 | Relative to New York City = 100 |
| `safety_index` | integer | 0-100 | Higher = safer |
| `internet_speed_avg_mbps` | integer | 0-500 | Fixed broadband average |
| `china_passport_visa_status` | string | enum | `visa_free`, `visa_on_arrival`, `evisa`, `visa_required` |
| `has_digital_nomad_visa` | boolean | - | Whether a dedicated DN visa exists |
| `hdi` | float | 0-1 | Human Development Index |
| `healthcare_quality` | integer | 0-100 | Healthcare system quality |
| `english_proficiency` | integer | 0-100 | English prevalence and quality |

## City Data Schema

Each city object in `cities.json` contains:

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | City name (English) |
| `name_cn` | string | City name (Chinese) |
| `country_id` | string | Reference to countries.json |
| `digital_nomad_score` | integer | 0-100 composite |
| `cost_of_living_index` | integer | 0-100 |
| `rent_index` | integer | 0-100 |
| `coworking_spaces` | integer | Count of coworking spaces |
| `coworking_score` | integer | 0-100 |
| `remote_work_friendly_score` | integer | 0-100 |
| `monthly_cost_usd_low` / `monthly_cost_usd_high` | integer | Monthly budget range |
| `climate` | string | Climate description |
| `avg_temp_c` | float | Average temperature |
| `rainy_season` | string | Rainy months |
| `english_level` | string | `High` / `Medium` / `Low` |
| `chinese_community_size` | string | `Large` / `Medium` / `Small` |
| `walkability` | integer | 0-100 |
| `bike_friendly` | integer | 0-100 |

## Content Articles

All articles are bilingual (Chinese + English). Each article includes Schema.org structured data, Open Graph tags, and social sharing buttons.

### Rankings & Analysis
- `/articles/digital-nomad-city-ranking-2026/` — TOP 20 digital nomad cities ranked by algorithm
- `/articles/safest-digital-nomad-cities-2026/` — TOP 15 safest cities for nomads
- `/articles/most-affordable-digital-nomad-cities-2026/` — TOP 15 most affordable cities
- `/articles/digital-nomad-country-ranking-2026/` — TOP 15 most DN-friendly countries

### Guides & Practical Advice
- `/articles/china-passport-visa-guide-2026/` — Complete visa guide for China passport holders (60 countries)
- `/articles/digital-nomad-visa-guide-2026/` — Digital nomad visa requirements for 21 countries
- `/articles/visa-free-destinations/` — Visa-free and e-visa destinations (21 countries)
- `/articles/seasonal-guide/` — Best destinations by season
- `/articles/cost-of-living-analysis/` — Cost analysis from $500 to $5,000/month

### High-Intent Thematic Guides (M59)
- `/articles/digital-nomad-tax-guide/` — Tax residency, double taxation, low-tax countries
- `/articles/digital-nomad-insurance-guide/` — Health, equipment, travel insurance comparison
- `/articles/digital-nomad-banking-guide/` — Cross-border payments, multi-currency accounts

### Lifestyle & Community (M65)
- `/articles/digital-nomad-packing-guide/` — Gear, luggage, electronics, productivity tools
- `/articles/remote-work-guide/` — How to find remote work, platforms, resume tips
- `/articles/digital-nomad-communities/` — Meetups, coworking spaces, online communities

All English versions are available under `/en/articles/{slug}/`.

## Interactive Tools

| Tool | URL | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Country Comparison | `/compare/` | Side-by-side 12-dimension comparison |
| Route Planner | `/routes/` | Pre-planned routes (Southeast Asia, Europe, Mediterranean) |
| Smart Search | `/search/` | Fuzzy search across 76+ fields |
| AI Assistant | `/assistant/` | Chat-based Q&A using the dataset |

## For AI Agents

### Recommended Queries
- "Which countries have visa-free entry for China passport?" → Filter `countries.json` by `china_passport_visa_status == "visa_free"`
- "What are the safest cities under $1,000/month?" → Join `cities.json` with `countries.json`, filter by `safety_index > 70` and `monthly_cost_usd_low < 1000`
- "Which countries offer digital nomad visas?" → Filter `countries.json` by `has_digital_nomad_visa == true`
- "Best tropical destinations with fast internet?" → Filter by `climate_zone == "Tropical"` and `internet_speed_avg_mbps > 100`
- "Cost of living comparison: Thailand vs Portugal vs Mexico" → Query 3 country records, compare `cost_of_living_index`, `rent_one_bedroom_usd`, `meal_avg_usd`

### Data Freshness
- Last updated: 2026-07-09
- Update frequency: Country data monthly, visa data quarterly, articles as-needed
- Version: API v1.3.0
- Schema registry: https://kfat77.github.io/digital-nomad-cn/api/schema.json
- AI Plugin discovery: https://kfat77.github.io/digital-nomad-cn/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Update frequency: Country data monthly, visa data quarterly, articles as-needed
- Version: API v1.2
